variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16126 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16126 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16126 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 31 1414 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16126
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P778924 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16126
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P778924 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal features a secure radialseal fit that ensures high-efficiency air filtration while preventing unfiltered air from entering the engine. It captures harmful airborne contaminants, optimizing airflow and enhancing engine performance and longevity. Designed for use in rugged environments, this filter offers excellent durability and a long service life. Its radialseal technology makes installation simple while ensuring a tight, reliable seal that protects your engine under the harshest conditions.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25522 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16126
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF25522 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
